theorem RCLike.norm_I {K : Type u_1} [RCLike K] : ‖(RCLike.I : K)‖ = if RCLike.I ≠ (0 : K) then 1 else 0 := by
  split_ifs with h
  · apply RCLike.norm_I_of_ne_zero h
  · push_neg at h
    simpa

This block calculates the expansion of `eLpNorm (T' (g₁ + g₂ + g₃ + g₄)) 1 (ν.restrict G)` using `eLpNorm_add_le` repeatedly.

theorem RCLike.norm_I {K : Type u_1} [RCLike K] : ‖(RCLike.I : K)‖ = if RCLike.I ≠ (0 : K) then 1 else 0 := by

    simpa
